frontend_action_ref: edit fields locked; correction drawer captures original value, corrected value, reason, evidence and approval route; surface=record shell with revision tree, effective date, affected WIP/open order analysis
evidence_refs: correction addendum, source evidence, review approval, affected record list, audit trail reconstruction
esign_refs: correction approval / responsibility for amended evidence when regulated
standards_refs: Append-only correction is the default for executed/accepted/signed evidence. B09 source: B02-B08 planning outputs. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
owner: original actor if available plus reviewer/QA; independent approver for high-risk records; policy owner: Master Data Owner + Engineering/Quality Owner
acceptance_gate: B10/M03/M04/C/D merge gate: exact owner, API, frontend, evidence, audit, e-sign and validation decision required
stop_rule: block any correction that overwrites original record, removes signature, loses timestamp or lacks impact assessment; group stop gate: revision/effectivity impact assessment + training/validation impact gate
reason_required: mandatory reason-for-change, original-vs-corrected value, discovery date, actual event date if late entry
repo_status: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

workflow: A11_LATE_ENTRY — Enter a late observation, missing entry or delayed evidence without falsifying contemporaneous timing — Item/BOM/routing/spec controlled master records

evidence_refs: late-entry statement, source note/evidence, actual event time, entry time, reviewer approval
esign_refs: late-entry attestation / review acceptance when regulated

owner: person with direct knowledge plus supervisor/QA review according to risk class; policy owner: Master Data Owner + Engineering/Quality Owner
acceptance_gate: B10/M03/M04/C/D merge gate: exact owner, API, frontend, evidence, audit, e-sign and validation decision required
stop_rule: block if the UI/API can make late entry appear contemporaneous or omit actual entry time; group stop gate: revision/effectivity impact assessment + training/validation impact gate
reason_required: mandatory late-entry reason and discovery/context statement
repo_status: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

workflow: A12_EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE — Emergency override of normal workflow due to urgent safety, containment, continuity or regulatory risk — Item/BOM/routing/spec controlled master records
command: emergency_override
frontend_action_ref: high-friction override surface, two-step challenge, visible emergency banner, countdown/post-review queue; surface=record shell with revision tree, effective date, affected WIP/open order analysis
evidence_refs: emergency justification, affected scope, actor authorization, post-action review task, remediation plan, evidence snapshot
esign_refs: emergency authorization / accountability for override; post-action review approval

owner: pre-authorized emergency role plus second approver/post-action QA review where feasible; policy owner: Master Data Owner + Engineering/Quality Owner
acceptance_gate: B10/M03/M04/C/D merge gate: exact owner, API, frontend, evidence, audit, e-sign and validation decision required
stop_rule: block if override is used for convenience, missing time-bound scope, missing audit, or actor lacks emergency authority; group stop gate: revision/effectivity impact assessment + training/validation impact gate
reason_required: mandatory emergency reason, risk-of-delay statement and time limit
repo_status: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.

workflow: A01_REJECT_REVIEW — Reject review or approval package before record reaches released/effective state — Quotation, customer order, shipment and invoice operational documents
command: reject
frontend_action_ref: reject action visible only in review state; required reason/evidence modal; released records show disabled action with correction/supersede alternatives; surface=document record shell with revision/cancel/ship/invoice correction controls
evidence_refs: review checklist, failed guard evidence, reviewer comment, linked record version, expected-version token
esign_refs: review rejection / responsibility for review outcome when regulated or GxP-impacting
standards_refs: Reject is not a delete operation; it preserves the failed review decision as evidence. B09 source: B02-B08 planning outputs. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
owner: assigned reviewer or QA/domain approver independent from creator; policy owner: Commercial Lead + Logistics/Finance Handoff Owner
acceptance_gate: B10/M03/M04/C/D merge gate: exact owner, API, frontend, evidence, audit, e-sign and validation decision required
stop_rule: block if record is released/effective/posted, actor is creator-only, reason absent, audit unavailable, or expected version stale; group stop gate: customer/order fulfillment impact gate + no silent edit after ship/invoice handoff
reason_required: mandatory reject reason category + free-text rationale + affected section/requirement reference
repo_status: Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
